creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
For example, from <https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=pkg-install&sektion=8&manpath=Ports#SYNOPSIS>: 

> 	 _pkg-origin|pkg-name|pkg-name-version_	...

(Sorry, bug 250699, I can not preview to tell whether Bugzilla will misrepresent what's above.)

Might 264661, and 266336, and this new bug share the same underlying cause(s)?
